commands.author: clawsweeper[bot]
commands.repair_reason: structured ClawSweeper needs-human verdict with repairable P-severity findings (sha=fd54d55ae5d5273eb5d5e841697bbe4e5eb065bd)
commands.review_summary:
The PR changes the WinUI chat timeline so the thinking placeholder renders as an assistant bubble, tool-call progress can nest inside assistant/thinking bubbles, and production chat ignores Chat Exploration visibility/metadata controls.

Reproducibility: yes. from source inspection: a turn with an assistant entry followed by a ChatToolCallStatus.Error burst now passes the unconditional b.Count > 0 nesting rule, and a thinking-state tool burst is nested unconditionally as well. I did not run the WinUI app in this read-only review.
commands.review_followup: Human PR follow-up is needed because the branch is dirty, the contributor needs to provide fuller real behavior proof, and the review finding should be fixed before merge.

target.title: Render thinking state inside assistant bubble
target.body: ## Summary - Render the assistant thinking placeholder inside an assistant chat bubble with secondary italic text - Nest tool-call progress inside the assistant/thinking bubble so the turn reads as one grouped response - Hide gateway usage metadata in production chat and isolate Chat Exploration debug controls from production visibility/layout - Keep production chat visuals stable while preserving Chat Exploration controls for the fake preview surface ## Validation - `./build.ps1` - `dotnet test ./tests/OpenClaw.Shared.Tests/OpenClaw.Shared.Tests.csproj --no-restore` — 1920 total, 0 failed, 29 skipped - `dotnet test ./tests/OpenClaw.Tray.Tests/OpenClaw.Tray.Tests.csproj --no-restore` — 1178 total, 0 failed - Windows XAML review: no blocking WinUI/XAML issues found
target.author: kenehong

commands.reason: repair commands require a ClawSweeper PR or a PR opted into ClawSweeper autofix or automerge
